message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
package "exercise3" {

  class GameLogic <<C>>
  class BoardPrinter <<C>>
  class WinCondition <<C>>
  class Board <<C>>
  class Move <<C>>
  class Piece <<C>>
  enum Player <<E>>

  package "movevalidator" {
    interface MoveValidator <<I>>
    class MoveIsForward <<C>>
    class MoveLength <<C>>
    class MoveIsDiagonal <<C>>
    class OpponentPieceBetweenJump <<C>>
    class StartPieceValid <<C>>
    class TargetFieldEmpty <<C>>
    class NoOtherJumpMovePossible <<C>>
  }

  MoveIsForward ..|> MoveValidator
  MoveLength ..|> MoveValidator
  MoveIsDiagonal ..|> MoveValidator
  OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..|> MoveValidator
  StartPieceValid ..|> MoveValidator
  TargetFieldEmpty ..|> MoveValidator
  NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..|> MoveValidator

  GameLogic ..> BoardPrinter
  GameLogic ..> WinCondition
  GameLogic ..> Board
  GameLogic ..> Move
  GameLogic ..> Piece
  GameLogic ..> Player
  GameLogic ..> MoveValidator

  WinCondition ..> MoveValidator

  BoardPrinter ..> Board

  MoveIsForward ..> Move
  MoveIsForward ..> Piece
  MoveIsForward ..> Player

  MoveLength ..> Move

  MoveIsDiagonal ..> Move

  OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..> Move
  OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..> Board
  OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..> Piece

  StartPieceValid ..> Move
  StartPieceValid ..> Board
  StartPieceValid ..> Piece
  StartPieceValid ..> Player

  TargetFieldEmpty ..> Move
  TargetFieldEmpty ..> Board

  NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> Move
  NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> Board
  NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> Piece
  NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> Player
  NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> MoveValidator

}
@enduml
```
